image:image.image:title: Proxilion. Confused-deputy defense for managed AI agents.
image:image.image:caption: A self-hosted reverse proxy that cryptographically binds every managed-agent action to the human user it is acting for.

image:image.image:title: PIC explained: Provenance, Identity, Continuity.
image:image.image:caption: The open authority protocol by Nicola Gallo that Proxilion is built on — three invariants, signed PCA chains, monotonically narrowing authority.
